win_condition: Good wins 3 of 5 missions and survives the Assassin's attempt to identify Merlin; Evil wins by failing 3 missions, forcing 5 consecutive rejected teams, or assassinating Merlin
message: The Resistance: Avalon has no VP. Good needs 3 successful missions, then must survive the Assassin's final guess at Merlin's identity. Evil wins by failing 3 missions, reaching 5 rejected team proposals, or correctly assassinating Merlin.
